title.en: Ye Tian has been researching and vetoing the ul...

content.en:
Time flies.

Ye Tian has been contemplating this doomsday prison, thus trying to create the ultimate killer move to crack this doomsday prison.

"The Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule isn't quite suitable. "

"The Darkest Ultimate Rule doesn't fit either. "

Ye Tian has been researching and vetoing the ultimate way of a door.

It's not that the ultimate killer created by these ultimate rules can't crack this doomsday prison, it can only be said that it is not suitable, and it will take a long time to hope to crack this doomsday prison.

Therefore, he wanted to crack it with the most suitable ultimate way.

Eventually, he found that it was the power of the Ultimate Path of the Extreme Sun that was most suitable.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian chose to use the ultimate way of the extreme day to conduct research, trying to create an ultimate killing move to break this doomsday prison.

And just as he was trying to create, some of the Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters were already going crazy, and they didn't see any hope at all.

"Lord Doomsday, please let me out, I give up the assessment, I want to go out. "

"I regret it, I shouldn't have come in!"

"Why do you set up such a difficult assessment, why will you be wiped out if you fail the assessment, I don't want to fall!"

"Hahaha, the inheritance place of the Doomsday Supreme Venerable is a pit, and it is deliberately letting us die!"

"I have no hope of getting out, and you have no hope of getting out, everyone has to die!" 253

Some of the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lords were on the verge of madness in despair, desperately attacking every place in the Doomsday Prison, but to no avail.

And as time went by, more and more Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Masters were desperate, and even their aura of despair hid other Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lords.

Suddenly.

An Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord cursed a word of Doomsday Extreme Venerable.

Immediately after, a terrifying force descended.

It was as if another invisible big hand pinched the Doomsday Extreme Venerable, and then under the gaze of many Ancient Ultimate Realm Lords, this Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord was directly pinched to death and turned into powder.

The other Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lords understood that this was the Doomsday Extreme Venerable's move.

Maybe the Doomsday Extreme Venerable didn't care about the things here, but with the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord cursing him, he would naturally strike at random, and for the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord, this casual blow could wipe him out countless times.

"The Ultimate Extreme Venerable is terrifying, the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord is like an ant in front of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, I don't know how many voids there are, and even the other party may not be in the Ultimate Land, this air blow can kill an Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord in seconds. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he continued to create the ultimate killer move, and was not affected by these things.

Another period of time has passed, and Ye Tian has gradually gained a lot of insights, and he has enough ideas about the ultimate killing move, but if he wants to gather countless ideas and form a killing move that can break the prison of doom, it is estimated that he will have to wait for a while.

In the blink of an eye, many years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian initially created an ultimate killing move, and immediately tried to attack the Doomsday Prison.

Rumble!!!!

The ultimate killer move of the Aurora Prison infiltrated a part of the Doomsday Prison and attacked the weak position.

Bang!

The Doomsday Prison shuddered a little, but it wasn't broken.

"Sure enough, it worked, but the ultimate killer move that was initially created only transferred one percent of the power to that shortcoming position in the end, and it had to be continued to be perfected. "

Ye Tian continued to create, perfecting again and again.

He didn't have any harshness on the power effect of this ultimate killing move, he only wanted to be able to transfer power to that flawed location in order to break through the prison of doom.

So, he created versions of this ultimate killer move.

Gradually, his assault on the Doomsday Prison became more and more concussive.

The other Ancient Ultimate Realm Lords were also envious when they saw Ye Tian's achievements, they could see that Ye Tian was not very far from success.

However.

Ye Tian was not the first ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord who could break through the prison of Doomsday.

this day.

An Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord directly penetrated the Doomsday Prison with a single blow, and quickly escaped, and was the first to complete the second (BDBC) level assessment.

The strength of many ancient level Ultimate Realm Lords was stronger than him, and his understanding of the ultimate path was not something he could imagine, and there were even many ultimate weapons that assisted in deduction and creation.

Therefore, it is normal that some Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters can take the lead in breaking the Doomsday Prison.

With the first, there is a second and third Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord.

In the end, on this day, the ultimate killing move created by Ye Tian directly penetrated most of the power into that shortcoming.

Click!

The Doomsday Prison has been torn open.

Ye Tian escaped from this crack for the first time.

[Congratulations on passing the second level of assessment.] 】

Hearing this voice, Ye Tian just waited for the arrival of the third level assessment.

However, the third level assessment has not yet begun, and they may still be waiting for these second-level Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters to complete the assessment before they will start the third level assessment together.

Time flies.

Time is ticking, and it's not too long before the end of the second level of assessment.

At this time, dozens of Gu-level Ultimate Realm Masters had already come out, but most of the Gu-level Ultimate Realm Masters were still inside the Doomsday Prison, and they were all desperate.

Time is on, and the time is counting down.

Soon, the last moment came.

Click!

One of the Doomsday Prisons was torn apart, and a second-level Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Master came out of the Doomsday Prison, revealing a look of excitement.

He was almost wiped out.

"It's time!"

An invisible force descended, and those ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lords who were trapped in the Doomsday Prison were annihilated along with the Doomsday Prison.

Seeing this scene, the surviving ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lords all trembled.

It's so ruthless!

There are so many ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lords, each of them has the hope of becoming an Immortal-level existence, and they are all overlords of the territory, and they all fall here.

......

A special area.

Two Ultimate Extremes are chatting here.

One is the Doomsday Extremity, and the other is the Shadow Sand Extremity.

"Doomsday Extreme Venerable, you are a little too ruthless in this inheritance land, killing so many ancient level Ultimate Realm Lords at once. Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable said.

Doomsday Supreme Venerable said indifferently: "You can't blame me for this, I set up such a threat, that is, to let those weak Ultimate Realm Masters who have no comprehension potential not to enter, but if they have to go in, then they will die! "

"Hahaha, too!"

Shadow Sha Jizun smiled and said.
